body_txt: Compare Ironic Echo , Ironic Echo Cut , Brick Joke , Phrase Catcher , Gag Echo , It's Been Done , Who Would Be Stupid Enough? , Surprisingly Shared Secret , Badass Minds Think Alike , Thinking the Same Thought . When the reality itself agrees with the dumbass, it's Achievements in Ignorance or The Cuckoolander Was Right . Not quite related to Are You Pondering What I'm Pondering? and Improbably Predictable .
